{{Quote|Those who challenge Fightmaster Jorak face certain death!|Fightmaster Jorak|<ref name="SWG:AED">{{GalaxiesAED}}</ref>}}
'''Jorak''' was a member of the [[Sanyassan Marauders]] from the forest moon of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], he paid an [[Spacer/Legends|individual]] 25 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to eliminate a [[Bark mite|bloodseeker mite]] which was attacking the Sanyassan's livestock. After this, he again paid the individual 30 credits to eliminate a [[Blurrg/Legends|blurrg]] which had eaten [[stinking verminweed]], causing it to go into a fury and knock over trees, homes, and even children. Finally, he paid the individual 40 credits to take out a [[Condor dragon/Legends|mantigrue]], which earned them his respect.

==Behind the scenes==
Jorak appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]], as part of the Marauder Themepark.
